name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast over warm water; stir to dissolve.
2. Add molasses, then dry milk. Let rise 10 minutes.
3. Fold in beaten egg yolk, followed by beaten egg white. Allow to rise 30-40 minutes.
4. Stir in first of the unbleached flour (A) until blended; beat for 10 minutes.
5. Cover bowl and set in warm place. Let rise about 1 hour 20 minutes.
6. Fold in melted butter and salt. Add pastry flour and additional unbleached flour (B), 1 cup at a time, folding without stirring.
7. When dough holds together as one piece, turn out onto a floured surface.
8. Knead dough with floured hands until smooth and somewhat shiny. Add more flour and re-flour the board as needed.
9. Place dough in an oiled bowl, roll to cover the oil, and cover with a towel. Let rise until doubled in size.
10. After rising, roll out to 12 inches x 14 inches (for 16 rolls; use 3/4 inch x 14 inches for each roll when scaled).
11. Spread with softened butter. Sprinkle with sugar, cinnamon, and raisins.
12. Roll up the dough, crimping edges to seal.
13. Cut into sections and place on oiled cookie sheets.
14. Let rise for 30 minutes.
15. Brush rolls with egg mixed with water.
16. Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 minutes.
